rationale: Both correctly land on the ground-truth resolution (PR #4792 fixed the None inter_stage_outputs regression from #4527, already folded into the 0.24 rebase commit a560ed1), matching the exact code snippet maintainers cited. Y is more deeply grounded, tracing the full causal chain through specific file:line citations (scheduler's _FULL_PAYLOAD_INPUT_STAGES, the accumulate_full_payload_output gating condition, the exact timeout log lines) rather than just naming affected files like X. X includes an unverifiable/likely-fabricated pytest test path and stray internal 'skill candidates' text that leaks into the answer, hurting polish and grounding. Y also ties the fix more concretely to the reporter's Qwen3-TTS pipeline and offers a tiered action plan, edging out X on completeness, though its specific version/commit claim about the reporter is itself an unverified addition.
